de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.actions

Class SendFeedbackAction

  • java.lang.Object
    • javax.swing.AbstractAction
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.actions.SendFeedbackAction
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ActionListener, Serializable, Cloneable, EventListener, Action

    public class SendFeedbackAction
extends AbstractAction
    AbstractAction used by ExceptionDialog in KeY report error button was pressed.
    Author:
    Kai Wallisch
